metadata.description: Component reliability tracking for Neuron project. Updated as features are implemented and tested.
metadata.updateFrequency: After each component completes implementation or testing

pythonBlockedReason: All tests passing. MCP server tests gracefully skip when mcp SDK not installed locally (passes in CI).

NeuronAccessibilityService.description: Core L5 NERVE layer - executes accessibility actions
NeuronAccessibilityService.notes: Service starts and binds correctly, event routing works. No unit tests for service itself (instrumentation needed).

UITreeReader.description: L2 PERCEPTION layer - reads UI tree and generates JSON
UITreeReader.notes: 29 tests passing (incl UITreeTools). Prunes invisible/non-interactive nodes, serializes JSON, handles depth limits, password field detection, tool-callable access. Gaps: no stress tests for large trees, no concurrent traversal tests.

ActionExecutor.description: L5 NERVE layer - executes NeuronAction objects (tap, type, swipe, scroll, global nav, launch, PressKey)
ActionExecutor.notes: 22 tests passing. Tap by nodeId/coordinate, type text, swipe, scroll, long press, global actions. Gaps: executePressKey() and executeLaunchApp() lack dedicated tests, no concurrency tests.

SensitivityGate.description: L3 BRAIN layer - blocks sensitive actions + package-level sensitivity check + category labels for redaction
SensitivityGate.notes: 81 tests passing. Password fields, 60+ banking/crypto/health/password-manager packages, editable PIN/CVV/OTP, isSensitivePackage(), getSensitiveLabel() with 6 category labels. HEY-61/HEY-62 security hardening.

LLMRouter.description: L3 BRAIN layer - routes between T0-T4 LLM tiers with fallback chain, injects ToolRegistry + workflow hints
LLMRouter.notes: 35 tests passing. Tier routing, sensitivity override to T4, password detection, fallback chain, timeout handling, pattern matching (open/launch/start/navigate), article stripping, and-rejection, already-open detection, home/back/recents/notifications. Gaps: buildSystemPrompt/buildUserMessage/getWorkflowHint not isolated-tested, no T0/T1 on-device model tests.

IntentClassifier.description: L3 BRAIN layer - classifies command complexity → select tier
IntentClassifier.notes: 24 tests passing. SIMPLE/MODERATE/COMPLEX classification, ASK_USER for ambiguous, domain classification (messaging/nav/settings/search). Gaps: no multi-language tests.

PlanAndExecuteEngine.description: L3 BRAIN layer - ReAct loop state machine for multi-step task execution with memory extraction
PlanAndExecuteEngine.notes: 49 tests passing (incl ExecutionModeTest + ConfirmationGateTest). State transitions, max step limit, confidence threshold, single/multi-step, error handling, repeated failure detection, CONFIRM action, supervised/autonomous/plan-approve modes, ConfirmationGate enforcement, pattern-match single-shot completion, step logging, memory extraction, zero-confidence passthrough. Gaps: no timeout abort test, no replanning verification.

WorkingMemory.description: L4 MEMORY layer - in-memory task state with SharedPreferences backup
WorkingMemory.notes: 16 tests passing. Current task set/get/clear, action history (limit 10), screen state hash, JSON serialization roundtrip + empty. Gaps: no thread-safety tests, no partial deserialization error tests.

LongTermMemory.description: L4 MEMORY layer - Room DB with UserPreference, AppWorkflow, ContactAssociation entities
LongTermMemory.notes: 22 tests passing. Preference CRUD, workflow insert/increment/update, contact upsert/fuzzy search, bulk clear. Gaps: no transaction rollback tests, no concurrent access tests.

MemoryExtractor.description: L4 MEMORY layer - auto-extracts preferences and workflows after task completion
MemoryExtractor.notes: Extracts app preferences from LAUNCH actions and caches workflow action sequences as JSON.

AppResolver.description: L3 BRAIN layer - 4-step app resolution with sensitive app warnings via SensitivityGate
AppResolver.notes: 30 tests. Known apps, package validation, fuzzy label, intent-based fallback, OEM handling. warnIfSensitive() logs SECURITY warnings for sensitive package resolution. HEY-62 follow-up.

ActionMapper.description: L3 BRAIN layer - maps LLMAction to NeuronAction including NAVIGATE enter/submit/notifications

ToolRegistry.description: SDK layer - in-memory tool registry with register/unregister/invoke/toPromptSnippet
ToolRegistry.notes: 12 tests passing. Duplicate detection, prompt snippet generation, async invoke.

NeuronSDK.description: SDK layer - public API for third-party tool registration
NeuronSDK.notes: Init guard, delegates to ToolRegistry. Tested indirectly via ToolRegistry tests.

SpeechRecognitionManager.description: L1 INPUT layer - wraps Android SpeechRecognizer with state machine and streaming partial results
SpeechRecognitionManager.notes: 15 tests passing. State: IDLE→LISTENING→PROCESSING→IDLE/ERROR. Partial text, final text, error, rmsDb.

ConfirmationGate.description: L3 BRAIN layer - blocks irreversible actions (send/delete/pay) until user confirms, enforced in ALL modes
ConfirmationGate.notes: 15 tests passing. Consolidated from brain/ (accessibility/ dup deleted). Checks requiresConfirmation flag, sensitive flag, confidence < 0.7, 13 irreversible keywords (send/pay/delete/remove/post/submit/transfer/purchase/confirm/publish/share/uninstall/buy). Wired into PlanAndExecuteEngine for ALL execution modes. 4 AUTONOMOUS-mode enforcement tests in PlanAndExecuteEngineTest.

VoiceInputController.description: L1 INPUT layer - bridges SpeechRecognitionManager with OverlayManager for hold-to-speak
VoiceInputController.notes: 4 tests passing (weakest coverage). Cancel listening, partial transcript, command callback. CRITICAL GAP: needs mic permission, noise filtering, command queue tests.

OnboardingScreen.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - 4-step onboarding wizard (Welcome → Permissions → Test → Done)
OnboardingScreen.notes: Compose-only UI. Persists completion state in SharedPreferences.

SettingsScreen.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - API key entry, privacy toggle, memory clear, audit log link
SettingsScreen.notes: Compose-only UI. Settings persist in SharedPreferences.

MCP_Server.description: Protocol Bus - Python MCP server on localhost:7384 with 10 tools + MCP resources + A2A protocol
MCP_Server.notes: 47 pytest tests all passing (33 A2A + MCP resources sync, 14 A2A + MCP resources async via pytest-asyncio). MCP server tests (14) gracefully skip when mcp SDK not installed locally — passes fully in CI where requirements.txt is installed. Test infra fixed: pytest-asyncio now works, test_mcp_server.py no longer crashes collection.

OverlayManager.description: L6 OUTPUT layer - floating overlay with 7 states (HIDDEN, IDLE, LISTENING, THINKING, EXECUTING, DONE, ERROR)
OverlayManager.notes: ComposeView-based overlay with accessibility overlay window type. LISTENING state added for voice.

NeuronBrainService.description: L3 BRAIN layer - foreground service hosting brain, command reception via broadcast + binder
NeuronBrainService.notes: Foreground service starts correctly, broadcast receiver works. No unit tests (requires instrumentation).

GeminiFlashClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - Gemini API client with 4-model fallback chain
GeminiFlashClient.notes: Works on-device when not rate-limited. 4-model chain.

OpenRouterClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - OpenRouter client with free model fallback chain
OpenRouterClient.notes: Working on-device. Llama 3.3 70B: ~3s latency. 50 req/day free.

OllamaCloudClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - Ollama Cloud Qwen3-VL 235B thinking model
OllamaCloudClient.notes: Primary T2/T3 provider. Action selection accuracy 86-93%. Latency 8-17s.

CharacterEngine.description: L7 CHARACTER layer - state management, emotion transitions, personality persistence
CharacterEngine.notes: 19 tests. Emotion debounce (100ms), auto-decay (30s), history, character selection, personality CRUD.

CharacterModels.description: L7 CHARACTER layer - EmotionState, PersonalityProfile, SpeakingStyle, CharacterType, VoiceProfile
CharacterModels.notes: 33 tests. KotlinX Serialization roundtrip, validation, factory defaults, TtsEmotion SSML mapping.

CharacterRenderer.description: L7 CHARACTER layer - ComposeCharacterRenderer + factory + EmotionVisuals
CharacterRenderer.notes: 12 tests. Factory Live2D fallback, emotion visuals for 8 states, safe dispose, lip-sync toggle.

EmotionalTTS.description: L7 CHARACTER layer - SsmlBuilder + VoiceSynthesizer + EmotionalTTSEngine
EmotionalTTS.notes: 18 tests. SSML prosody for all emotions, state machine, voice profile application.

PersonalityPrompt.description: L7 CHARACTER layer - PersonalityPromptBuilder + CharacterSystemPrompt + ResponseEmotionExtractor
PersonalityPrompt.notes: 18 tests. Trait-based prompts, merge with brain prompt, compact T4, keyword emotion extraction.

CharacterUI.description: L7 CHARACTER layer - CharacterViewModel, GalleryScreen, CustomizationScreen, SettingsSection
CharacterUI.notes: 9 tests. ViewModel bridges engine to Compose, gallery state, customization, slider clamping.

CharacterIntegration.description: L7 CHARACTER layer - end-to-end integration tests for full character pipeline
CharacterIntegration.notes: 11 tests. Full pipeline, error handling (fallbacks), T4 compact prompt. LLMRouter characterContext backward compatible.

ExecutionMode.description: L3 BRAIN layer - HITL execution modes (AUTONOMOUS/SUPERVISED/PLAN_APPROVE) for Play Store compliance
ExecutionMode.notes: 8 tests. ConfirmationCallback, mode-gated dispatch, DONE bypass, build flavors (sideload/playstore).

UITreeTools.description: L2 PERCEPTION layer - RLM-inspired tool-callable UITree access replacing monolithic JSON dumps
UITreeTools.notes: 20 tests. getClickableNodes, getNodeByText, searchNodes, getScreenSummary, toPromptSnippet. 60-80% token reduction.

NeuronToolSchema.description: L3 BRAIN layer - structured tool definitions for 7 action types with JSON injection prevention
NeuronToolSchema.notes: 17 tests. Tool definitions, toActionType (case-insensitive), toPromptSnippet, toJson serialization. JSON escaping: escapeJson() prevents structure injection via quotes/backslashes/newlines/control chars in toGeminiToolsJson() and toOpenAIToolsJson(). ToolRegistry validates tool names (regex) and description length.

FunctionGemmaClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - on-device FunctionGemma (270M) T1 function calling client via InferenceEngine interface
FunctionGemmaClient.notes: 15 tests. InferenceEngine abstraction, parseToolCall regex, named arg parsing (single/double quotes), baseline confidence 0.85.

DualPathExecutor.description: L5 NERVE layer - routes actions through AppFunctions (preferred) or Accessibility (fallback)
DualPathExecutor.notes: 8 tests. AppFunctionsExecutor stub (ready for stable API), AccessibilityExecutorAdapter bridge, ExecutionPath tracking.

StructuredToolCallParser.description: L3 BRAIN layer - unified parser for Gemini, OpenAI, FunctionGemma, and legacy JSON tool call formats
StructuredToolCallParser.notes: 20 tests. Auto-detect format, Gemini functionCall, OpenAI tool_calls, FunctionGemma func(), legacy JSON, markdown fence stripping.

PluginManager.description: Plugin layer - NeuronPlugin lifecycle management with error isolation
PluginManager.notes: 20 tests. Register/load/unload/unregister, error isolation, tool registration, CharacterPlugin extraction.

SkillSystem.description: SDK layer - SKILL.md parsing, validation, and loading with ToolRegistry integration
SkillSystem.notes: 27 tests. SkillManifest YAML parser, SkillValidator (permissions, schema), SkillLoader (register/unload), namespaced tools.

AppFunctionsProvider.description: SDK layer - @NeuronCapability annotation and CapabilityScanner for third-party app integration
AppFunctionsProvider.notes: 12 tests. Annotation discovery via reflection, provider lifecycle, capability metadata extraction.

Gemma3nClient.description: L3 BRAIN layer - on-device Gemma 3n (2B effective) for T1.5 and T4 tiers with multimodal support
Gemma3nClient.notes: 15 tests. Availability, multimodal support, text/multimodal generation, screen context, error handling.

ServerBrainPlanner.description: Server-side brain/planner.py - action plan generation (8th must-test component)
ServerBrainPlanner.notes: server/brain/planner.py does not exist yet (only .gitkeep). CRITICAL GAP: this is one of the 8 must-test components per QA spec.

CrossAppContext.description: L3 BRAIN layer - persists extracted data across app boundaries with prompt injection filtering and sensitive app redaction
CrossAppContext.notes: 25 tests. Store/retrieve, max entries/truncation, app sequence, prompt injection filtering (PromptSanitizer), sensitive app redaction (SensitivityGate labels), extracted value exclusion from sensitive packages. HEY-61 security fixes.

ScreenExtractor.description: L3 BRAIN layer - extracts visible text, skips sensitive screens and packages in app sequence
ScreenExtractor.notes: 11 tests. Normal extraction, sensitive blocking, max limit, short text skip. Sensitive packages not recorded in appSequence. HEY-62 follow-up.

IntentTemplates.description: L3 BRAIN layer - parameterized intent builder with MIME type allowlist and URI scheme validation
IntentTemplates.notes: 45 tests. JSON params, buildIntent, URI scheme allowlist, MIME type allowlist (text/image/video/audio/pdf/json, fallback to text/plain), package name validation (lowercase-only), buildFromValue. HEY-61 mimeType security fix.

AppSwitchHandler.description: L3 BRAIN layer - orchestration layer for cross-app transitions, skips recording sensitive packages
AppSwitchHandler.notes: 13 tests. Detect, execute, retry, banking privacy, context management. Sensitive packages not recorded in appSequence. HEY-62 follow-up.

MultiAppPlanDisplay.description: L3 BRAIN layer - generates user-facing summary of multi-app task plan before execution
MultiAppPlanDisplay.notes: 9 tests. Multi-app detection, single-app, dedup consecutive launches, reasoning/description fallback, data transfer detection, no-launch actions, formatForDisplay with/without data transfers. Part of HEY-30.
